_comment: Map human-readable book names to ChromaDB source metadata tags. The source_tag must exactly match the 'source' field stored during ingestion — it is derived from the PDF filename stem (before any '__' separator). Run scripts/inspect_db.py to see all source tags currently in the database. importance_filter can be 'High', 'Medium', 'Low', or null (all).

books.description: Financial Services Regulatory Examinations (FRE 1) — core regulatory framework and compliance obligations.
Financial Services Regulatory Examinations (FRE 2) — advanced regulatory topics and practical application.
Mortgage advice fundamentals, regulation, and core suitability principles.
Mortgage advice regulation, responsible lending, and suitability assessment for 2025/26.
